headline: 1 Insurance Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Find Risky
summary: Insurance companies serve as the backbone of risk management, providing essential protection and financial security for individuals and businesses. Still, investors are uneasy as insurers face challenges from catastrophic events and potential regulatory changes. These doubts have caused the industry to lag recently as insurance stocks have collectively shed 4.2% over the past six months. This drawdown is a stark contrast from the S&P 500’s 10% gain.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on The Hartford Insurance Gr, Lowers Price Target to $154
summary: Mizuho  analyst Yaron Kinar   maintains The Hartford Insurance Gr (NYSE:HIG) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $159 to $154.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on The Hartford Insurance Gr, Lowers Price Target to $154
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Elyse Greenspan   maintains The Hartford Insurance Gr (NYSE:HIG) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $165 to $154.
